name: @fintech-portfolio/money
description: Pure, framework-agnostic money utilities (currency minor-unit conversion) shared by the mock backend and any UI/data-access consumer, so this logic is defined once rather than duplicated per consumer.

metadata.scope: Domain logic, not API shape: @fintech-portfolio/contracts defines the Money type (what an amount looks like on the wire); this package defines toMajorUnits (how to correctly interpret it per currency). Kept separate so libs/contracts can stay pure types/DTOs — safely regenerable from a schema — with zero hand-written runtime logic.
